semantic.role: Defines an architectural rule that prohibits service layers from directly importing database adapters, ensuring separation of concerns.
responsibilities: Specifies file patterns where rule applies and excludes
Sets severity to error and enforceability
Provides rationale for domain boundary preservation
outOfScope: Does not define specific repository interfaces or abstractions
Does not cover other architectural rules or exceptions

English.purpose: To prevent tight coupling between application services and the database implementation layer by enforcing that only repository abstractions are used.
English.context_and_audience: This rule targets developers and automated governance tools (ArchSpine) that scan TypeScript source files. It is used in CI and local development to catch violations early.
key_takeaways: Service layers must not import from src/db/* directly.
Use repository interfaces or abstractions as intermediaries.
Violations are treated as errors (severity: error).
